gwtails
  • gwtails
  • View page source

gwtails

gwtails is a Python package to analyze post-merger late-time tails in eccentric binary black hole (BBH) mergers.

This code is based on the papers:

  • Phenomenology and origin of late-time tails in eccentric binary black hole mergers — Islam, Faggioli, Khanna, Field, van de Meent, Buonanno (2024)

  • Bayesian analysis of late-time tails in spin-aligned eccentric binary black hole mergers — Islam, Faggioli, Khanna (2025)

Features

  • Least-squares fitting of QNM, tail, and cross-term components via PostMergerAmplitudeFit

  • Bayesian MCMC fitting with flexible parameter fixing via TailFitMCMC

  • Auxiliary utilities for computing tail exponents, frequencies, and finding tail start times

  • Built-in visualization for fit diagnostics and corner plots
